scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc -p packages/design-tokens/tsconfig.json && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json && pnpm exec tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build
scripts.lint:framework: pnpm exec eslint --max-warnings 0 --config eslint.config.mjs apps/web stories .storybook
scripts.prepare: git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && pnpm exec lefthook install || true
scripts.format: pnpm run format:biome && pnpm run format:prettier
scripts.format:check: pnpm run format:check:biome && pnpm run format:check:prettier
